headline: Here's Why Las Vegas Sands (LVS) is a Strong Value Stock
summary: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

headline: A Look At Las Vegas Sands (LVS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Las Vegas Sands stock performance snapshot Las Vegas Sands (LVS) has been under pressure recently, with the stock down about 1% over the past day and 6% over the past week, extending declines over the past month and past 3 months. At a recent close of US$50.65 and a market value of about US$34b, investors are weighing this pullback against annual revenue of US$13.74b and net income of US$1.84b from its Macao and Singapore resort operations. See our latest analysis for Las Vegas Sands. Recent...
